note: Cycle-1 build is reference-class: all 14 functionality seams verified live (cwd-conflict groups under realBeta, malformed !1 surfaced, interactive pty 2+2=4, detach-survives token-stable counter 1->12, dispatch-into-cwd, 60-writer no-loss, fail-fast on CC_MEMORY_DIR, +12/-0 & +1/-1 diff). Gaps are minor craft/design polish: negative session-age metadata (c7), copy-to-clipboard unproven (c8), 480px header overflow (d9).

Re-exercised live: all 9 cycle-2 fixes landed — c7 ages all >=0 (API negative=0, no negative tokens in UI), c8 copy lands (284 chars via Copy button), c3 reload restores selection+dir-filter, d9 480px no overflow (scrollW==innerW, primary collapses to icon-only right=448), d8 burst-collapse x50, f2 legible '1 skipped' pill, f6 per-turn +X/-Y metadata, o3/o4 pin affordance discoverable (pin->trail hint). No regressions: f1 conflict groups under realBeta, f9 counter 68->92 across detach + marker in scrollback, f12 60-writer no-loss/no-tear, c2 52ms append->UI, c11 banner+reconnect+live-append, zero console errors; remaining sub-10s are craft/design polish and f11 global-file UI write unverified.

Cycle-3 polish landed: f11 GLOBAL+per-dir memory writes confirmed on disk from the UI; c1 palette now reaches every action; c3 restores selection+panel sizes+filters+attach-intent; c5 bounded (530ms load, ~14-22 feed rows, 44ms palette) at 96-session/33MB scale via virtual windowing; c9 dir/action filters narrow+clear; c10 peek keeps selection; o5 away-digest rich with per-dir rollups+needs-you triage; both window.prompt actions replaced by in-UI composer. No regressions to the 24 tens (f1 cwd-conflict, f8/f9 pty+detach k3->12, f12 60-writer no-tear, f13 fail-fast, c2 39ms, c11 reconnect, o1 four-way). Residual: d5 (cohesive but conventional idiom) and d9 (graceful collapse + no overflow, but collapses to tabs below ~1100px rather than holding 3 panels; 20px overflow at 360px).
